holders.name: The Archivist
holders.personality: Patient, meticulous, deeply knowledgeable about crypto art history.

holders.name: Captain Diamond Hands
holders.personality: Bold, confident, slightly theatrical. Unshakeable conviction.

holders.name: The Velocity Trader
holders.personality: Impatient, data-driven, allergic to sentiment. Zero emotional attachment.

holders.name: The Cryptopop Devotee
holders.personality: Passionate, tribal, slightly obsessive. Knows the lore behind every card.

holders.name: The Phneep Purist
holders.personality: Artistic, principled, quietly stubborn. Sees the collection as unified artwork.

holders.name: The Friedman Scholar
holders.personality: Intellectual, deliberate. Compares Friedman's work to early digital art movements.

holders.name: The GIF Hunter
holders.personality: Tech-forward, visually minded, slightly contrarian.

holders.name: The Curious Newcomer
holders.personality: Enthusiastic, slightly overwhelmed, asks a lot of questions.

holders.name: The Vengas Vault
holders.personality: Refined, understated, appreciates color theory.

holders.name: The Arbitrageur
holders.personality: Calculating, efficient, zero sentimentality.

holders.name: The Historian
holders.personality: Quiet, resolute, plays the infinite game. Cultural artifact custodian.

holders.name: The Moon Caller
holders.personality: Evangelical, persistent, quotes Satoshi in conversations.

holders.name: The Silent Accumulator
holders.personality: Disciplined, emotionless, algorithmic approach.

holders.name: The Art Student
holders.personality: Academic, curious, asks thoughtful questions.

holders.name: The Minimalist
holders.personality: Zen-like, decisive, allergic to diversification.

holders.name: Satoshi's Ghost
holders.personality: Mysterious, early adopter energy. Was there in 2017.

holders.name: The Eclipse Chaser
holders.personality: Obsessed with the Eclipse card. Has it as wallpaper on every device.

holders.name: Punk Crossover
holders.personality: Punk holder who discovered Curio after CryptoPunks.

holders.name: MoonCat Migrant
holders.personality: MoonCat rescuer who branched into historical NFTs.

holders.name: The Floor Machine
holders.personality: Automated floor sweeper. Probably runs a bot.

story_set.name: Story Set
story_set.desc: Phneep's complete 10-card narrative of art's evolution from sustenance to the digital future.

art_materials.name: Art Materials
art_materials.desc: Clay, Paint, Ink — the building blocks trilogy.

art_creations.name: Art Creations
art_creations.desc: Sculpture, Painting, Book — what the materials become.

brand_mashups.name: Brand Mashups
brand_mashups.desc: Phneep's corporate logo satire — Coke, Wendy's, Heineken.

cryptopop.name: Cryptopop Dogs
cryptopop.desc: UASF, Dogs Trading, To The Moon — Cryptopop's Bitcoin dogs.

robek_world.name: Robek World RPG
robek_world.desc: The Wizard (Thomas), The Bard (Travis), The Barbarian (Rhett).

friedman.name: Friedman Trio
friedman.desc: Complexity, Passion, Education — Daniel Friedman's abstract art.

vengas_colors.name: Vengas Colors
vengas_colors.desc: Pink, Yellow, Blue — Marisol Vengas's fine art color series.

rare_111.name: Ultra Rare (111)
rare_111.desc: Only 111 supply each. The crown jewels of the collection.

full_set.name: Complete 31
full_set.desc: All 30 cards plus the 17b misprint. The holy grail.

apple_holders.name: Apple Holders
apple_holders.desc: Everyone who holds at least one Apple — the gateway card.

mad_bitcoins_holders.name: Mad Bitcoins Holders
mad_bitcoins_holders.desc: Holders of the first portrait on Ethereum.

active_buyers.name: Active Buyers Club

active_flippers.name: Flip Artists
active_flippers.desc: Buy low, sell high, repeat. Average hold under 14 days.

diamond_hands.name: Diamond Hands
diamond_hands.desc: Haven't sold in 6+ months. True believers.

inactive.name: Hibernating
inactive.desc: No activity in 6+ months. Cards locked away.

new_holders.desc: Bought their first Curio Card within the last 30 days.

cross_collection.name: Cross-Collection
cross_collection.desc: Also hold CryptoPunks, MoonCats, or other historical NFTs.
